no: Spiritwalker shaman kit by Ulb. Three spirit animal forms (Yak, Tiger, Crane) with unique mechanics. Requires BGEE/BG2EE/EET.

conflicts.reason: A7 Improved Shamanic Dance scans kitlist.2da and patches all shaman kits. Install Spiritwalker BEFORE A7 Shamanic Dance.

passive.desc: Shamanic Dance triggers 1-round shapeshift into attuned Spirit Animal instead of summoning spirits. -4 AC during dance. Does NOT summon spirits.
20% physical damage resistance in all forms. Cannot benefit from Iron Skins while shifted.

activated.effects: Choose spirit animal at creation: Yak (tank: +AC, +HP%, +STR/CON, Booming Roar), Tiger (DPS: +THAC0, +STR, +10% crit, -30% HP, Ravenous Pounce), Crane (caster: retains spells, +saves, +MR, -70% HP, Mystic Wisdom). All scale every 6 levels.

restrictions.armor: Leather, studded leather, hide only. Bucklers only.
restrictions.items: Cannot summon spirits. Cannot benefit from Iron Skins while shifted. Animal Mind (Yak/Tiger): no spellcasting in form. Requires WIS 12, CHA 12.

hlaPool.note: Custom HLA chain: HP → crit → MR → instant shift

spellRestrictions.note: Cannot summon spirits (replaced by shapeshift). Yak/Tiger forms: no spellcasting. Crane form: retains spells at +2 casting speed.

new: Shaman walking between the mortal and spirit worlds. Enhanced spirit communication.

sum: A shaman kit with three spirit animal transformations: Yak (tank), Tiger (damage), and Crane (utility).

co.no: Adds the Spiritwalker shaman kit with three spirit animal transformations (Yak, Tiger, Crane).
